price_messages.text_original:
**__Product Range__**
Our product range includes various functional bitumen, oxidized bitumen, emulsions, and solutions in bulk, barrels, and jumbo bags. We guarantee the quality of all our products, even at the destination.
——————————————-
**__Aina ya Bidhaa__**
Aina mbalimbali za bidhaa zetu zinajumuisha lami mbalimbali zinazofanya kazi, lami iliyooksidishwa, emulsion, na miyeyusho kwa wingi, mapipa na mifuko ya jumbo. Tunahakikisha ubora wa bidhaa zetu zote, hata mahali tunapoenda.
price_messages.text_english:
**__Product Range__**
Our product range includes various functional bitumen, oxidized bitumen, emulsions, and solutions in bulk, barrels, and jumbo bags. We guarantee the quality of all our products, even at the destination.
——————————————-
**__Aina ya Bidhaa__**
Aina mbalimbali za bidhaa zetu zinajumuisha lami mbalimbali zinazofanya kazi, lami iliyooksidishwa, emulsion, na miyeyusho kwa wingi, mapipa na mifuko ya jumbo. Tunahakikisha ubora wa bidhaa zetu zote, hata mahali tunapoenda.

price_messages.text_original:
Unlock the potential of your projects with our premium bitumen supplies! Enjoy flexible FOB and CFR delivery options, packing barrel / jumbo bag and convenient payment via TT or LC. Your success starts with us!
——————————————-
Fungua uwezo wa miradi yako ukitumia vifaa vyetu vya juu vya lami! Furahia chaguo rahisi za uwasilishaji za FOB na CFR, kufunga pipa/begi kubwa na malipo rahisi kupitia TT au LC. Mafanikio yako yanaanza na sisi!
price_messages.text_english:
Unlock the potential of your projects with our premium bitumen supplies! Enjoy flexible FOB and CFR delivery options, packing barrel / jumbo bag and convenient payment via TT or LC. Your success starts with us!
——————————————-
Fungua uwezo wa miradi yako ukitumia vifaa vyetu vya juu vya lami! Furahia chaguo rahisi za uwasilishaji za FOB na CFR, kufunga pipa/begi kubwa na malipo rahisi kupitia TT au LC. Mafanikio yako yanaanza na sisi!

price_messages.text_original:
**__Bitumen Emulsion description__**
•  It's also identified by its breaking behavior, which is the process where the emulsion releases the bitumen to form a continuous film.
General Specifications:
•  The specifications of bitumen emulsion can vary, but generally, it contains about 60% bitumen and 40% water.
•  The emulsion's properties, such as viscosity, setting time, and breaking behavior, are controlled by the type and amount of emulsifier used.
Bitumen emulsion is widely used in road construction and maintenance because it can be applied at lower temperatures, reducing energy consumption and emissions. It also has good adhesive properties, especially cationic emulsions, which improve the bonding between bitumen and aggregates
If you need more detailed information or have any questions, feel free to contact the JCEC sales department.! louis@jcec-mecc.com; zhang@jcec-mecc.com

price_messages.text_original:
**__Good Morning, Esteemed Managers and Experts in Road Construction,__**

As we embark on another productive day, I want to extend my warmest greetings to each of you.** Jambo**!

Your dedication and hard work in building and maintaining our roads are truly commendable. As we continue with our operations, I would like to remind everyone of the utmost importance of observing **safety** precautions. Ensuring the **safety** of both yourselves and your personnel is not only a matter of compliance but also a critical aspect of our collective well-being.

Accidents and injuries can be costly, both in terms of human life and financial resources. By adhering to **safety** protocols, we can prevent unnecessary risks and ensure that our projects are completed efficiently and **safely**.

Let's work together to create a safe and productive environment for everyone involved. Thank you for your attention and commitment to safety.

**Habari za asubuhi! (Good morning!)**

price_messages.text_original:
Chagua kampuni ya HEMT Bitumen
Hii ndiyo sababu HEMT Bitumen ndio chaguo bora zaidi kwa mradi wako unaofuata.

**__Ubora Usio na Kifani:__** Lami yetu imetolewa kwa uangalifu na kusafishwa kwa utendakazi usio na kifani.
**__Uimara wa Muda Mrefu__**: Barabara zilizojengwa kwa lami hustahimili mtihani wa wakati, na kupunguza mahitaji ya matengenezo.
**__Inaaminika kwa Vizazi:__** Urithi wa ubora, Lami ya HEMT imekuwa msingi wa miradi ya miundombinu kwa miongo kadhaa.
Usitulie kwa chochote kidogo. Wasiliana na HTME leo na ufungue njia ya mafanikio!

Tunatazamia kushirikiana nawe!

price_messages.text_original:
Je, unatafuta lami ya ubora wa juu kwenye mapipa, jumbobags au wingi? Tumekushughulikia! ✨

Kwa nini tuchague? 💡

□ Chaguo zinazonyumbulika: 💧 alama zote na vifungashio—chaguo lako! ✔️
■ Malipo salama: 💰 T/T au L/C kwa amani yako ya akili.
□ Usafirishaji wa haraka: 🚚 FOB au CFR ili utimize agizo haraka.
■ Mtoa huduma anayeaminika: ⭐️ Inatoa ubora kila wakati!

Je, uko tayari kuagiza? 〽️

Wasiliana nasi leo!
+98 9122003787 kwenye WhatsApp au Telegramu

□ Usaidizi wa kitaalamu: 🛠 Timu yetu iko hapa kukusaidia kwa mahitaji yako yote ya lami! Kuanzia uteuzi wa bidhaa hadi uwasilishaji, tumekupa mgongo wako.
■ Uhakikisho wa ubora: 🏆 Tunapata lami bora zaidi pekee, na kuhakikisha kuwa unapokea bidhaa za hali ya juu kila wakati.
□ Bei shindani: 💲 Pata pesa nyingi zaidi kwa bei yako na viwango vyetu vya kuvutia! Bajeti yako ni muhimu kwetu.
■ Suluhisho maalum: 🔧 Je, unahitaji kitu mahususi? Tunaweza kurekebisha huduma zetu ili kukidhi mahitaji yako ya kipekee!

Usingoje tena - furahia bora zaidi katika lami leo! 🌍
Tutumie ujumbe sasa kwa +98 9122003787 kwenye WhatsApp au Telegram na tuanze! 🚀
